company.name: Singtel
company.description:
Singtel Group is Asia's leading communications technology group, providing a portfolio of services from next-generation communication, digital services and digital infrastructure including regional data centre arm Nxera and regional IT services arm NCS. The Group has presence in Asia, Australia and Africa and reaches over 820 million mobile customers in 20 countries.  

Singtel is dedicated to continuous innovation, harnessing next-generation technologies to create new and exciting customer experiences as we shape a more sustainable, digital future.

all.title: Director, Regional HR
all.description: Business HR partner to the Global Business unit of NCS. Lead both local and overseas HR teams to support the overseas operations in the NCS group which include Australia, Brunei, China (Suzhou, Chengdu, Shanghai & Beijing), Hong Kong, Malaysia, Philippines, South Korea and Middle East (Dubai & Bahrain)

company.name: NCS Group
company.description: NCS is a leading AI Tech Services company. With a 15,000-strong team across the Asia Pacific, NCS scales its platforms and capabilities to provide clients with greater agility and AI expertise across a range of Industries. Embracing a strong ecosystem of global partners, NCS transforms technology services delivery combining AI with digital resilience to drive real business impact. NCS is a subsidiary of the Singtel Group. For more information, visit ncs.co.

all.title: Data Analyst Intern (Regional Business Intelligence)
all.description:
[Brand Partnership Team]
• Worked closely with Regional Brand Partnership teams to identify, grow, retain and optimize strategic partnerships with brands across 7 geographical regions in Southeast Asia and Taiwan through data tools like Apache Airflow and Spark
• Automated data report generation of various brands, providing critical data to the partnership teams promptly for decision-making, saving up to 10 man-hours monthly
• Conducted in-depth analysis using Python and Excel to identify potential areas of growth for brands across categories

company.name: Shopee
company.description:
Shopee is the leading e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan. It is a platform tailored for the region, providing customers with an easy, secure and fast online shopping experience through strong payment and logistical support.

Shopee aims to continually enhance its platform and become the region’s e-commerce destination of choice via ongoing product optimisation and localised user-centred strategies. 

Shopee, a Sea company, was first launched in Singapore in 2015, and has since expanded its reach to Malaysia, Thailand, Taiwan, Indonesia, Vietnam and the Philippines. Sea is a leader in digital entertainment, e-commerce and digital financial services across Greater Southeast Asia. Sea's mission is to better the lives of consumers and small businesses with technology, and is listed on the NYSE under the symbol SE.

The Shopee team is rapidly expanding across the region and we are constantly on the lookout for talents who have the passion and drive to become part of our dynamic team. Do check out our career website http://careers.shopee.com for our available positions!

all.title: Business Analyst Intern (Retail Finance)
all.description:
• Part of business team managing online consumer lending portfolio P&L and growth, responsible for providing analytical insights to drive decision-making process
• Performed analysis on in-house credit product vs competitor credit product on Shopee and studied user behavior change – delivered the findings and recommendations to management – prevented $2m risk loss and improved BAU process
• Conducted a profiling and segmentation exercise to better understand users of online credit by analyzing data, identified multiple variables which were eventually added to credit-scoring model, potentially identifying 20% more quality users
• Drove the end-to-end development of 5 live dashboards to track critical business metrics (e.g. GMV, ADO, % new/repeat buyers), from ideation, stakeholder alignment to execution

company.name: Monee
company.description:
🌐 Who We Are
Monee is a leading digital payments and financial services provider in Southeast Asia, with a growing presence in Latin America. Its mission is to better the lives of individuals and businesses in the region with financial services through technology.

Monee delivers a comprehensive range of digital financial products and services, including mobile wallets, payment processing, credit, banking, and insurtech. By leveraging technology and strategic partnerships, Monee aims to drive greater digital financial inclusion, convenience, and accessibility for individuals and small businesses across Southeast Asia and Latin America.

Monee is part of Sea Limited, a global technology company.

✨ Our Employer Value Proposition (EVP): Make it Simple, Make it Last
At Monee, you’ll shape the future of simple, reliable digital finance that betters the lives of individuals and businesses. You’ll create impact that lasts and grow in a vibrant, digital-first culture that rewards curiosity, innovation, and collaboration.

Our EVP Pillars
1) Purpose: Empower lives of underserved individuals and communities through inclusive, intuitive financial solutions.
2) Growth: Grow your career across opportunities, teams, and markets; turn bold ideas into real outcomes.
3) Culture: Thrive in an open, collaborative culture that values authenticity, creativity, and shared success.

🔎 Who We’re Looking For
Curious, driven, and collaborative builders who want to shape the future of digital finance. People who enjoy solving real problems, working across teams and markets, and turning bold ideas into meaningful outcomes.

🚀 Join Us (https://careers.monee.com/careers)
Be part of a vibrant, digital-first culture that values autonomy, continuous learning, and shared success. At Monee, you’ll create an impact that lasts.


#Monee #MakeItSimpleMakeItLast

all.title: Research Assistant
all.description:
• Data Pre-processing
• Text Mining & Topic Classification (e.g. Naive Bayes, Support Vector Machines)
• Conducted state and event Sequence Analysis (e.g. transition rates, entropies, cluster analysis)

company.name: National University of Singapore
company.description:
At NUS, we are shaping the future through our people and our pursuit of new frontiers in knowledge. In a single century, we have become a university of global influence and an Asian thought leader. Our location at the crossroads of Asia informs our mission and gives us a tremendous vantage point to help create opportunities and address the pressing issues facing Singapore, Asia and the world.

At NUS, we believe in education, research and service that change lives.

Read our social media community guidelines here: https://nus.edu/socialmediaguidelines.

all.title: Business Analytics Intern
all.description:
• Generated insights and recommendations from marketing campaign analysis using Python, leading to a 20% increase from run-rate
• Scrapped Google Play Store for EZ-Link Mobile Application Reviews and conducted Sentiment Analysis using Python, potentially saving 15 man-hours monthly
• Presented findings of the aforementioned Sentiment Analysis to CEO and stakeholders, leading to a feature being prioritised in the next development phase
• Developed an Intranet HR Portal using React to aid new hires in integrating into the company and familiarizing themselves with its products or services
• Crafted specifications for Business Intelligence Power BI Dashboard (showing real time KPIs), potentially reducing 10 man-hours weekly

company.name: EZ-Link Pte Ltd
company.description:
EZ-Link is the leading smartcard issuer in Singapore with the EZ-Link card valued as a key catalyst in Singapore’s transformation into a globally reputed cashless society.

With innovation at the core of our business, EZ-Link continuously introduces new products and services and set new cashless trends through relentless pursuit of excellence. From being the first non-bank to the issuance of the FEVO Prepaid Mastercard to its award-winning “My EZ-Link Mobile” Application, EZ-Link has expanded its product offerings in the payment industry. 

The launch of  “EZ-Link NFC SIM”  has also effectively changed the payment landscape on Singapore’s public transport system. Our latest foray into Account-Based Ticketing for "EZ-Pay" has allowed for Singapore’s first free card-less ERP payment service.

EZ-Link’s innovative prowess has also gone beyond the shores of Singapore, developing the world’s first dual-currency multi-functional contactless card, the SINO Visitor Pass, in collaboration with Guangdong Lingnan Pass. 

With the vision of being Singapore’s leading prepaid choice for travel and lifestyle needs, EZ-Link is committed to continuously develop products and services that would enhance the journeys of our valued customers.

Do you have what it takes to join our dynamic team at the forefront of innovation?

Join us and be part of the team to continuously push the boundaries of innovation to produce exciting products and services, enhancing journeys and delighting customers in Singapore and beyond.

headquarters.line1: 438B Alexandra Road Blk B Alexandra Technopark

all.title: Senior Teaching Assistant
all.description:
• Provided guidance to approximately 90 attendees of Python Courses
• Reinforced concepts taught by going through assignment solutions in class
• Assessed assignments and provided feedback to attendees

company.name: SDSA - Singapore Data Science Academy
company.description:
Singapore Data Science Academy is started by people who are passionate about Data Science and would want to help grow the community by educating the public about Data Science. They choose to add value and build up the Data Science ecosystem instead of taking the profit-driven approach. One thing the founders are very particular about is the quality of lessons have to be at top-notch standards and students really learn & benefit from their classes rather than just going for the certificate.

In a nutshell, they are nurturing a new generation of innovators and thinkers that do not just attend classes for learn-sake but rather learn and apply in real-world situations. Using data science and analytics to solve problems for all different scenarios.

all.title: Global Materials Intern
all.description:
• Streamlined PO Approval Process by propagating the K2 Platform across all Parts Distribution Centre (PDCs) to ensure consistency across sites, improving transparency and making the process audit-favourable
• Worked with colleagues from various departments to design a process and scoring rubric for After-market Supplier Award and standardized it across sites
• Developed a Power BI Dashboard of all Governance initiatives for Management overview, improving time-efficiency for Management reporting
• Documented projects, set-up SharePoint, created step-by-step User Guides for Governance processes for easy reference and implementation
• Presented completed projects to the Site Leader and various Department Heads at the end of internship

company.name: Cummins Inc.
company.description:
At Cummins, we empower everyone to grow their careers through meaningful work, building inclusive and equitable teams, coaching, development and opportunities to make a difference. Across our entire organization, you'll find engineers, developers, and technicians who are innovating, designing, testing, and building. You'll also find accountants, marketers, as well as manufacturing, quality and supply chain specialists who are working with technology that's just as innovative and advanced. 

From your first day at Cummins, we’re focused on understanding your talents, current skills and future goals – and creating a plan to get you there. Your journey begins with planning your development and connecting to diverse experiences designed to spur innovation. From our internships to our senior leadership roles, we attract, hire and reward the best and brightest from around the world and look to them for new ideas and fresh perspectives. Learn more about #LifeAtCummins at cummins.com/careers.

all.title: Temporary Data Analyst (Systems and Information Management Section)
all.description:
• Kick-started a study on streamlining existing BTO/SBF Sales processes to be more time-saving – gathered data through short interviews with approximately 20 applicants during attachment with counter staff
• Presented to the management innovative analyses of gaps and solutions of the aforementioned study, of which some were eventually adopted in subsequent project developments
• Supported projects involving the conversion of dashboards from SAS Visual Analytics (VA) to Tableau

company.name: Housing & Development Board
company.description:
The Housing & Development Board (HDB) is Singapore's public housing authority and a statutory board under the Ministry of National Development.

HDB plans and develops public housing towns that provide Singaporeans with quality homes and living environments. HDB engages in active research and development work to ensure that cost-effectiveness and quality standards are maintained and continually improved upon.

Even as HDB towns are provided with various commercial, recreational and social facilities and amenities for the convenience of residents, one of HDB’s key priorities is to ensure that they meet changing needs and circumstances. Through renewal and upgrading programmes, HDB brings new features, facilities and improvements to its older estates and towns to ensure their vibrancy and continued relevance. 

Another key priority of HDB is the building of cohesive communities within its towns. Living environments are provided with community spaces for residents to mingle and interact. Public housing policies and schemes are formulated not only to meet changing needs and aspirations, but they also support national objectives such as maintaining racial harmony and stronger family ties, and focus on the needs of elderly and those who may be in financial difficulty. In addition, with its network of HDB Branches, HDB ensures that it is well integrated in the daily lives of the community it serves.

Visit www.hdb.gov.sg for more information, or find us at @SingaporeHDB on Facebook, Twitter, Telegram and Instagram.

all.description:
• Kick-started a study on streamlining existing BTO/SBF Sales processes to be more time-saving – gathered data through short interviews with approximately 20 applicants during attachment with counter staff
• Presented to the management innovative analyses of gaps and solutions of the aforementioned study, of which some were eventually adopted in subsequent project developments
• Supported projects involving the conversion of dashboards from SAS Visual Analytics (VA) to Tableau

company.name: Housing & Development Board
company.description:
The Housing & Development Board (HDB) is Singapore's public housing authority and a statutory board under the Ministry of National Development.

HDB plans and develops public housing towns that provide Singaporeans with quality homes and living environments. HDB engages in active research and development work to ensure that cost-effectiveness and quality standards are maintained and continually improved upon.

Even as HDB towns are provided with various commercial, recreational and social facilities and amenities for the convenience of residents, one of HDB’s key priorities is to ensure that they meet changing needs and circumstances. Through renewal and upgrading programmes, HDB brings new features, facilities and improvements to its older estates and towns to ensure their vibrancy and continued relevance. 

Another key priority of HDB is the building of cohesive communities within its towns. Living environments are provided with community spaces for residents to mingle and interact. Public housing policies and schemes are formulated not only to meet changing needs and aspirations, but they also support national objectives such as maintaining racial harmony and stronger family ties, and focus on the needs of elderly and those who may be in financial difficulty. In addition, with its network of HDB Branches, HDB ensures that it is well integrated in the daily lives of the community it serves.

Visit www.hdb.gov.sg for more information, or find us at @SingaporeHDB on Facebook, Twitter, Telegram and Instagram.
